sowing.method: Planting of sword suckers or tissue culture plantlets

seed_rate.notes: Optimal planting density of 2500-3000 suckers per hectare.

sowing.soil_conditions: Rich, well-drained fertile clayey-loam soils with pH 6.5-7.5.

irrigation.notes: Banana is a water-loving plant; ensure soil remains consistently moist.
Critical moisture requirement during flowering and bunch initiation.
Irrigate regularly to support fingers filling out.

fertilizer.method: Pit application mixed with organic manure
fertilizer.notes: Apply high phosphorus early on for root development.
Split application to support massive vegetative canopy.
High Potassium is critical for bunch quality and finger size.

maturity_indicators: Fingers become full and angularity disappears (become rounded)
Dry leaves on plant increase and top leaves turn yellow
harvest.harvest_method: Cutting bunch with sharp sickle leaving 30cm stalk
harvest.notes: Handle bunches carefully to avoid bruising. Store in ventilated crates.
